ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to each company (e.g., ABC12, XYZ13) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is located */,
  "vat_number" TEXT /* VAT number of the company */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax ID of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the account belongs to */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Account name */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., asset, liability, equity, revenue, expense) */,
  "account_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of account (e.g., current asset, non-current asset) */,
  "account_description" TEXT /* Description of the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the transaction belongs to */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the transaction affects */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., invoice, credit note, debit note) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction (e.g., EUR, USD, CAD) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate applied to the transaction */,
  "transaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to each currency (e.g., EUR, USD, CAD) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate of the currency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the currency record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the currency record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "exchange_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency the exchange rate belongs to */,
  "exchange_rate_date" TEXT /* Date the exchange rate was effective */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate on the effective date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange rate record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange rate record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_balances" (
  "account_balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account balance */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the balance belongs to */,
  "balance_date" TEXT /* Date the balance was calculated */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account balance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account balance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_balances_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., balance sheet, income statement) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_lines" (
  "report_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report line */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the line belongs to */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the line affects */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the line */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report line record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report line record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_lines_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_lines_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, accountant, manager) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit trail record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit trail record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission assigned to the role (e.g., view reports, manage accounts) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission is assigned to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_groups" (
  "account_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account group */,
  "account_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the account group */,
  "account_group_description" TEXT /* Description of the account group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account group record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account group record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_group_members" (
  "account_group_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account group member */,
  "account_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account group */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account group member record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account group member record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_group_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_group_members_account_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_group_id") REFERENCES account_groups ("account_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_group_members_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)
